stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Boeing 737 has a seating capacity of 160 passengers, and it is scheduled to operate a holiday charter Commercial Air transport flight within Europe. The loading manifest shows the following information:

Passengers An: 6 adults + 2 infants (carried on the same seat of the parent)
Passenger baggage total weighs: 110 kg
Freight: 1020 kg

If the operator uses standard masses for passengers (all adults) and checked baggage, the actual traffic load of this flight is…
